goal: Ship provider execution cost and quota boundary evidence without claiming actual provider billing correctness.
risk: AOF may allow provider-backed execution to advance without an explicit budget owner, cost ceiling, quota, rate-limit, billing boundary, or overage policy.
loss_boundary: Do not call v9.6 release-ready unless provider-cost-quota-boundary-audit, capability delta, product value evidence, and release-state audit are green, and missing cost/quota evidence blocks execution.
acceptance_gates: release-state-audit includes the v9.6 cost/quota boundary gate
evidence_plan: schemas, commands, boundary artifact, capability delta, product value evidence, focused tests, release-state audit
stop_conditions: Stop if execution can advance without budget owner or cost ceiling
Stop if not-proven boundary claims actual provider billing correctness
